assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (axios) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 13 shows 'Upstream Affected Component (customfield_10632) | axios'. overlap-check.md lines 7-8 confirm customfield_10632: axios is a prerequisite, and lines 16-18 show the JQL search query 'cf[10632] ~ "axios"' used to find related CVE Jiras, returning TC-8008.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 35-38 explicitly show Filter Validation: 'PS Component match: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui == pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui -- MATCH' and 'Stream match: rhtpa-2.2 == rhtpa-2.2 -- MATCH'. The related CVE TC-8008 shows customfield_10669 and customfield_10832 values matching the current CVE.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8008 to find remediation task TC-8009 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 42-52 under 'Remediation Task Traversal' states: 'TC-8008 has the following linked remediation task (link type "Depend"):' and shows Task Key TC-8009 with summary 'Bump axios to 1.9.0 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (1.9.0) against the current CVE's fix threshold (1.8.2) and determines the fix is already covered
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 54-63 under 'Coverage Comparison' shows: 'Current CVE (TC-8010) fix threshold | >= 1.8.2', 'Existing remediation (TC-8009) bump target | 1.9.0', 'Comparison | 1.9.0 >= 1.8.2', 'Result | COVERED -- the existing remediation meets or exceeds this CVE’s fix threshold'.

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing the issue because existing remediation task TC-8009 already bumps axios past the fix threshold — no new remediation task is created
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 5: 'Decision: No new remediation task needed. Recommend closing TC-8010 as covered by existing remediation.' Lines 35-37 specify closing TC-8010 with resolution 'The fix is already covered by TC-8009'. overlap-check.md line 96: 'Close TC-8010 -- the fix is already covered by TC-8009'. triage-outcome.md lines 64-68 explain why no new task is created.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Related link between the current CVE (TC-8010) and the related CVE (TC-8008) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 73-75: 'Create Related link between TC-8010 and TC-8008 (same upstream component -- axios): Check existing issuelinks on TC-8010: no existing links found. Action: Create link (type: "Related", inward: TC-8010, outward: TC-8008)'. The idempotency check on existing issuelinks is explicitly performed before creating.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 creates a Depend link from the covering remediation task (TC-8009) to the current CVE (TC-8010) with an idempotency check on existing issuelinks before creating
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 77-79: 'Create Depend link from TC-8009 (covering remediation task) to TC-8010 (current CVE): Check existing issuelinks on TC-8010: no existing links found. Action: Create link (type: "Depend", inward: TC-8010, outward: TC-8009)'. The idempotency check on existing issuelinks is explicitly performed before creating.

assertion_results.text: A comment is posted on the current CVE documenting the cross-CVE overlap finding — including the related CVE key (TC-8008), covering task key (TC-8009), library (axios), bump version (1.9.0), and fix threshold (1.8.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 81-92 show 'Post comment on TC-8010 documenting the cross-CVE overlap finding' with content including: 'existing remediation task TC-8009 (from CVE-2026-42035 / TC-8008) already bumps axios to 1.9.0, which meets or exceeds this CVE’s fix threshold (1.8.2)'. All required elements are present: related CVE key (TC-8008), covering task key (TC-8009), library (axios), bump version (1.9.0), fix threshold (1.8.2).
